untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition for descending triangle (trendline along descending peaks) and doji formation detection, which are not available as quantitative indicators. The 56% reversal rate at doji and support level reversal history (points A and B) require candlestick pattern analysis beyond the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available indicators: lower_wick as proxy for doji (small body with long wicks), s1 (pivot support level 1) as proxy for round number support level, and close crossing below support as entry/exit trigger. However, the core descending triangle pattern and doji detection cannot be reliably encoded without pattern recognition capability. Stop loss set to 0.12% (approximately 23 pips below round level like 19.80 to 19.77 example). Recommend implementing custom candlestick pattern detector for full signal fidelity.
